chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1452 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case (Priority) 1.For orders on o/objection 2.For hearing of CMA 5793/24 3.For hearing of main case 10-12-2025 Mr. Shafique Ahmed Khan Leghari, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Tarique Hameed Qureshi, Advocate for respondent No.8. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G-Sindh. **** In compliance of order dated 09.10.2025, learned AAG files Inquiry Report under the cover of his statement and submits that, as per the said report, all 21 employees (petitioners) are genuine appointees; however, counsel representing respondent No.8 submits that the grievance of the petitioners in respect of release of their salaries will be redressed within one month. Under the circumstances, while allowing this petition, we direct the respondents to redress the grievance of the petitioners only in respect of release of their salaries within a period of two months from the date of this order. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
